source_summary: M37.2 fixture validates that proposal drafts remain external, review-gated, and non-writing.
candidate_claims: Hermes-agent may draft candidate memory proposals.
Runes Shield validates proposal structure and governance boundaries.
Human review remains required before trusted memory promotion.

policy_notes: Fixture must not encode approved, applied, promoted, or trusted status.
Fixture must not imply trusted wiki write or database mutation capability.
Fixture is used for smoke/regression validation only.
